ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism from which the sequence was obtained */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the organism */,
  "strain" TEXT /* Strain or subspecies of the organism */,
  "sequence_type" TEXT /* Type of sequence (e.g., DNA, RNA, protein) */,
  "sequence_data" TEXT /* Actual sequence data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sequence (e.g., public database, lab experiment) */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the sequence */,
  "gc_content" REAL /* GC content of the sequence */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the sequence was uploaded to the system */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last date the sequence was modified */,
  "accession_number" TEXT /* Accession number if the sequence is from a public database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "codon_usage" (
  "codon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each codon usage record */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence the codon is from */,
  "codon" TEXT /* Codon (e.g., GCA, GCC, GCG) */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the codon in the sequence */,
  "relative_frequency" REAL /* Relative frequency of the codon in the sequence */,
  "synonymous_codons" TEXT /* List of synonymous codons for the same amino acid */,
  "usage_context" TEXT /* Context for codon usage (e.g., start, stop, internal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("codon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_codon_usage_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amino_acid_frequencies" (
  "aa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amino acid frequency record */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence the amino acid is from */,
  "amino_acid" TEXT /* Amino acid (e.g., A, C, D) */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the amino acid in the sequence */,
  "relative_frequency" REAL /* Relative frequency of the amino acid in the sequence */,
  "codon_usage_pattern" TEXT /* Codon usage pattern for the amino acid */,
  "functional_role" TEXT /* Functional role of the amino acid (e.g., structural, catalytic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amino_acid_frequencies_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phylogenetic_trees" (
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phylogenetic tree */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence the tree is based on */,
  "tree_data" TEXT /* Actual tree data (e.g., Newick format) */,
  "tree_type" TEXT /* Type of phylogenetic tree (e.g., rooted, unrooted) */,
  "tree_method" TEXT /* Method used to construct the tree (e.g., maximum likelihood, neighbor-joining) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the tree */,
  "tree_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the tree image for visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phylogenetic_trees_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_alignments" (
  "alignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence alignment */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence being aligned */,
  "aligned_sequence" TEXT /* Aligned sequence data */,
  "alignment_type" TEXT /* Type of alignment (e.g., global, local) */,
  "alignment_method" TEXT /* Method used for alignment (e.g., Needleman-Wunsch, Smith-Waterman) */,
  "alignment_score" REAL /* Score of the alignment */,
  "alignment_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the alignment image for visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_alignments_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genetic_variability" (
  "variability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic variability record */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence the variability is calculated for */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric (e.g., mean, median, CI) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "variability_measure" TEXT /* Measure of variability (e.g., nucleotide diversity, haplotype diversity) */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population or sample group for which the variability is calculated */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the variability metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genetic_variability_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or research group the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., public database, lab experiment) */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was published */,
  "accession_number" TEXT /* Accession number if the dataset is from a public database */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation information for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_sequences" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tool */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the tool */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* URL of the tool's documentation */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation information for the tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool used for analysis */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence being analyzed */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Actual analysis result data */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., alignment, tree construction) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "result_format" TEXT /* Format of the result data (e.g., text, JSON, image) */,
  "result_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the result image for visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES analysis_tools ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sequence or result */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence or result being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or tool used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
